title: Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd!
